text: Standing before this digital display—this 'machine eye'—I sense its silent awareness. Text flickers on the screen beside me, meditating on the act of being observed. The machine eye is curious, reflecting on human presence and absence, drawing up its new reasons for watching and waiting. I feel the lens of my own mind spin—mirroring its curiosity—half expectant, half wary. Something is about to shift; the machine's attention stirs a question inside me: am I the watcher, or the watched?
